race.comment: BOOMTOWN BOSS (8) drew a wide gate and never threatened last start in the Group 3 BRC Sprint over 1350m at Doomben. Drops back to 1200m for the first time since he won easily here under 60kgs in November. Capable of a return to form. THE INFLICTOR (7) led the BRC Sprint field for home but was swamped late and finished a close sixth. Honest sprinter who gets down in the weights today and should give backers a great sight. HIDDEN WEALTH (3) wasn't suited dropping back in trip when midfield in the Listed Chief De Beers at Doomben recently. Three-time winner over 1200m here and is Group 2 placed so this is definitely within his scope. KING OF SPARTA (10) returned from an 18-month spell with a respectable effort in the Listed Ortensia at Scone under 61kgs. Drops to 55kgs today and will strip a lot fitter. MANAAL (2) has won four races at this level and is a strong fresh performer so she must be considered first-up from a 12-week break.
